narrative: Traders await US NFP data as Fed Chair Warsh signals easing inflation risks, keeping the dollar steady — EUR/USD holds at 1.1388 with the Fed-ECB +150bp OIS carry spread capping upside; gold lower -0.47%; equities -0.22%; DXY -0.06%; VIX 16.6. GBP/JPY leads G10 performance (+0.762% vs -0.698%) on a 1.460% spread, while USD/JPY trades at 162.50 with options pricing a notable premium (IV 7.2% vs HV30 2.4%). Watch US Payrolls at 12:30 UTC.
